title: alnus alnobetula var. fruticosa
intro: Alnus alnobetula var. fruticosa, also known as the Green Alder or Mountain Alder, is a variety of the Green Alder tree, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Alnus alnobetula var. fruticosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Alnus alnobetula var. fruticosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
